title: Ceasefire 'stops' War Powers clock on Iran, Hegseth claims — Senate Day 2 hearing
snippet: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth argued the ceasefire 'pauses or stops' the WPR 60-day clock in Senate Armed Services hearing. Sen. Tim Kaine pushed back: 'I do not believe the statute would support that.' Hegseth again called congressional critics 'biggest adversary.' For 6th time, Senate failed to advance WPR by 50-47 vote. Collins (R-ME) voted with Democrats for first time.
tag_reason: First report of Hegseth Senate Armed Services Day 2 hearing and WPR clock-pause claim; distinct from yesterday's House hearing
